heading: Selection boards; notice of convening; communication with board
label: 2108 Selection boards; notice of convening; communication with board

children.label: a
children.text: Before a board is convened under , notice of the convening date, the promotion zone to be considered, and the officers eligible for consideration shall be given to the service at large.section 2106 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Each officer eligible for consideration by a selection board convened under may send a communication through official channels to the board, to arrive not later than the date the board convenes, inviting attention to any matter of record in the armed forces concerning such officer. A communication sent under this section may not criticize any officer or reflect upon the character, conduct, or motive of any officer.section 2106 of this title
